item.title: week 01 MAD345
item.description: Dear all, Below you can find the details of zoom meeting. Topic: MAD345 MINING 2 _Week01 Time: Oct 7, 2020 09:00 AM Istanbul Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/2064310007 Meeting ID: 206 431 0007

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Dear all, This blog is created for the Hacettepe University Mining Engineering Fall 2020-2021 lectures notes' repository given by me. You can navigate through the “Tags” that are attached to each post in corresponding dates for upcoming lectures. Good Luck! GE
